_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #93: mostEfficientHousing divided every housing type's cost by the HUT's increase.by, so a Collector (+5000 pop) scored as +3 and AT would never buy one. Reads the evaluated building's increase.by now. User-approved behavior change (it changes which housing AT buys); pinned by two new tests in buildings.characterization.test.ts and positive-controlled.
